_rationale: get_context name=Add resolves the symbol on the multi-lang corpus (func Add, a.go:3). The earlier no-mode name path was gated behind a non-empty mode= and returned {contexts:[],count:0}, mirroring Go's id-only handleGetObjectContext. That Go oracle is retired (goldens are the sole oracle now), and a silent empty result for a valid symbol name is the synthetic-passes-while-real-is-empty trap the suite guards against, so the name path now resolves regardless of mode (handlers_core.cpp handle_get_context). Deliberate divergence from the old id-only no-mode contract; file_path normalized to ${CORPUS}.

tiers._rationale_stable: Full envelope + body. Name-only get_context now resolves to one context (Add) with stable signature/purity/location; result.content[].text is byte-stable after ${CORPUS} path normalization.
tiers._rationale_ignore: Standard JSON-RPC envelope noise plus timing residue.
